_documentation.description: Optional reference template for a per-form response-processing flow that retrieves the Azure Function key from Key Vault at runtime before calling /api/process-response. This is NOT the default behavior of the repo's generated flows, but it is a valid manual pattern if you want runtime key lookup.
notes: Use this only if you intentionally want a Key Vault dependency inside the Power Automate flow.
The HTTP body still uses the current raw_response passthrough pattern expected by /api/process-response.
If the function-app-key secret is updated in Key Vault, this template picks up the new value on the next run.
The Azure Key Vault connector is premium and requires appropriate secret-read permissions.
Auto-created flows in this repo do not currently use this runtime Key Vault pattern.

flow_name: Forms to Fabric: Process Response (Key Vault)

trigger.type: When a new response is submitted
trigger._comment_trigger: This trigger fires each time a respondent submits the configured Microsoft Form.

actions.name: Get_secret
actions._comment: Reads the current function key from Key Vault at runtime.

actions.name: Call_Azure_Function
actions._comment: POST the raw Forms payload using the secret retrieved in the previous step.

if_true._comment: Success. No additional action is required.

inputs.subject: Forms to Fabric - Pipeline error: response @{triggerOutputs()?['body/responseId']}
inputs.body:
Forms to Fabric pipeline error

A form response failed to process.

Form ID: @{triggerOutputs()?['body/formId']}

Response ID: @{triggerOutputs()?['body/responseId']}

HTTP Status Code: @{outputs('Call_Azure_Function')?['statusCode']}

Error Details:

@{body('Call_Azure_Function')}

Timestamp: @{utcNow()}

AZURE_FUNCTION_URL.description: Full URL of the Azure Function endpoint, including /api/process-response.

KEY_VAULT_NAME.description: Azure Key Vault name that stores the function-app-key secret.

ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL.description: Monitored mailbox or distribution list that receives failure alerts.

FORM_ID.description: Microsoft Form ID for the clinician data-collection form.

setup_instructions: 1. Confirm you actually want runtime Key Vault lookup; generated flows in this repo do not use this pattern by default.
2. Create a new Automated Cloud Flow and select the target Microsoft Form.
4. Add an Azure Key Vault 'Get secret' action for the function-app-key secret.
5. Add an HTTP POST to <function-app>/api/process-response with the x-functions-key header populated from body('Get_secret')?['value'].
6. Use the body shape shown in this template: form_id plus raw_response from body('Get_response_details').
7. Add a failure email branch and test the flow.
